KANCA TEGAL was born from a community of: KANCA TEGAL was born from a community of local youths who believe that literacy is the key to progress and growth in Tegal. Founded on the principles of collaboration and creativity, we bridge the gap between traditional wisdom and modern literacy in this digital age.

Kanca Tegal berbentuk platform/wadah bag: Kanca Tegal is a collaborative platform for the local literacy community in Tegal and its surroundings.
Wadah kolaborasi literasi lokal yang dii: A local literacy collaboration space initiated by local youths of Tegal.
Kanca Tegal adalah komunitas independen: Kanca Tegal is an independent community engaged in literacy, alternative education, and the preservation of local cultural archives in Tegal. Our focus is not just on physical books, but also on building an alternative discussion ecosystem.
Para inisiator di komunitas meyakini pen: The initiators in the community believe in the importance of physical reading spaces and direct face-to-face discussions to face the onslaught of the rapid digital era. We are committed to spreading the reading virus to the corners.
Misi: Membangun ruang diskusi yang membe: Mission: To build discussion spaces that empower the community through alternative literacy.
Kanca Tegal lahir di akhir tahun 2022 da: Kanca Tegal was born in late 2022 from a shared concern over the lack of reading spaces and alternative discussions in Tegal. We believe literacy is a transformative force.
Kolaborasi adalah kunci utama kami menge: Collaboration is our primary key to developing this ecosystem. We synergize with artists, writers, and regional communities to spark fresh ideas.
Di era digital ini, kami tetap percaya p: In this digital era, we still believe in the power of physical interaction through physical books and face-to-face discussions.
Dalam bahasa Jawa, 'kanca' berarti teman: In Javanese, 'kanca' means friend. We are not just a library, but a friend in seeking knowledge and sharing experiences.
Tempat di mana Anda bisa bertemu dengan: A place where you can meet us and the mobile library, and enjoy casual face-to-face discussions.
Kanca Tegal dikelola secara sukarela dan: Kanca Tegal is managed voluntarily and independently. You can contribute by donating books, volunteering your time, or providing funding to support the operation of this mobile library for the advancement of Tegal literacy.
